description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless tank top featuring a graphic print and loose, knee-length denim shorts with a printed design on the left leg. He sports a red baseball cap and a pair of casual sneakers, and his outfit is accessorized with a belt and a holstered object on his right hip. His arms are extended slightly outward, and his facial expression is neutral. The tank top is fitted, revealing defined arm muscles, while the shorts are baggy and end just below the knees. The shoes are athletic in style, and the overall appearance suggests a casual, urban streetwear look. His hair is short and visible beneath the cap, and he stands in a relaxed, upright posture.
description: A muscular adult male in urban streetwear, featuring a graphic tank top, baggy denim shorts, a red cap, and sneakers, standing upright with arms slightly out.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic tank top, facial features, belt, holster, and printed design on the left leg of the shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, arm, and the holstered object on the right hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tank top, cap, and the loose fit of the shorts, with both arms visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, arm, and the holstered object more clearly.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a sleeveless tank top and loose denim shorts, accessorized with a belt and holster, and a baseball cap
